mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.register_no as register_no, r.pet_id, r.owner_user_id as owner_id, r.doctor_id, r.service_item_id as service_type, r.triage_note as symptom, r.status, r.amount, r.register_time as visit_time, r.accept_time, r.create_time, r.update_time, p.name as pet_name, p.type as pet_type, p.breed, p.age, p.gender, u.real_name as owner_name, u.phone as owner_phone FROM register_record r LEFT JOIN pet p ON r.pet_id = p.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON r.owner_user_id = u.id WHERE r.id = #{id}
SELECT r.*, p.name as pet_name, u.real_name as owner_name FROM register_record r LEFT JOIN pet p ON r.pet_id = p.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON r.owner_user_id = u.id ORDER BY r.create_time DESC

SELECT r.id, r.register_no as register_no, r.pet_id, r.owner_user_id as owner_id, r.doctor_id, r.service_item_id as service_type, r.triage_note as symptom, r.status, r.amount, r.register_time as visit_time, r.accept_time, r.create_time, p.name as pet_name, p.type as pet_type, p.breed, p.age, p.gender, u.real_name as owner_name, u.phone as owner_phone FROM register_record r LEFT JOIN pet p ON r.pet_id = p.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON r.owner_user_id = u.id ORDER BY r.register_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE register_record SET status = CASE WHEN #{status} = 0 THEN 'WAITING' WHEN #{status} = 1 THEN 'IN_PROGRESS' WHEN #{status} = 2 THEN 'DONE' WHEN #{status} = 3 THEN 'CANCELED' ELSE status END, accept_time = CASE WHEN #{status} = 1 THEN NOW() ELSE accept_time END, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
